docket_entries.description: ANSWER TO COMPLAINT FILED BY DEFENDANT SEVIER, JENNIFER R COOKE, CECELIA

NOTICE OF SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE; SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE SET FOR FEB-28-2013 AT 1:00 PM IN DEPT. 212 WITH SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE OFFICER MARK DIVELBISS.
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITH PREJUDICE
